resources.string:
Anroid 1.0 was Google's first Android 
release. Web browser support, camera 
support, Gmail counts, Google maps, and a Youtube application were among the basic 
capabilities. Although it does not have \an official name like the other introduced 
variations, it is known informally as Apple 
Pie. In Android 1.0, the API level is set to 1. 
It is no longer utilized in mobile devices. It 
was published on September 23, 2008.
